debug_info.goal:
a b c d s : ℝ
h₀ : 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ 0 < c ∧ 0 < d
h₁ : s = a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d)
⊢ 1 < s ∧ s < 2

proof:
obtain ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩ := h₀
  constructor
  · rw [h₁]
    have h1 : a / (a + b + d) > a / (a + b + c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h2 : b / (a + b + c) > b / (a + b + c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h3 : c / (b + c + d) > c / (a + b + c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h4 : d / (a + c + d) > d / (a + b + c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)
    linarith [add_div a b (a + b + c + d), add_div (a + b) c (a + b + c + d), add_div (a + b + c) d (a + b + c + d), div_self (by linarith : a + b + c + d ≠ 0)]
  · rw [h₁]
    have h1 : a / (a + b + d) < a / (a + b) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h2 : b / (a + b + c) < b / (a + b) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h3 : c / (b + c + d) < c / (c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h4 : d / (a + c + d) < d / (c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)
    linarith [add_div a b (a + b), add_div c d (c + d), div_self (by linarith : a + b ≠ 0), div_self (by linarith : c + d ≠ 0)]
failed_attempts:
rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩
  constructor
  · rw [h₁, (by field_simp [by linarith]; ring : 1 = a / (a + b + c + d) + b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d))]
    gcongr <;> linarith
  · rw [h₁]
    calc a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d)
        < a / (a + b) + b / (a + b) + c / (c + d) + d / (c + d) := by gcongr <;> linarith
      _ = 2 := by field_simp [by linarith]; ring

constructor
  · rw [h₁]
    have h1 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left h₀.1 (by linarith : 0 < a + b + d) (by linarith : a + b + d < a + b + c + d)
    have h2 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left h₀.2.1 (by linarith : 0 < a + b + c) (by linarith : a + b + c < a + b + c + d)
    have h3 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left h₀.2.2.1 (by linarith : 0 < b + c + d) (by linarith : b + c + d < a + b + c + d)
    have h4 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left h₀.2.2.2 (by linarith : 0 < a + c + d) (by linarith : a + c + d < a + b + c + d)
    have h5 : a / (a + b + c + d) + b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) = 1 := by field_simp; linarith
    linarith
  · rw [h₁]
    have h1 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left h₀.1 (by linarith : 0 < a + b) (by linarith : a + b < a + b + d)
    have h2 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left h₀.2.1 (by linarith : 0 < a + b) (by linarith : a + b < a + b + c)
    have h3 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left h₀.2.2.1 (by linarith : 0 < c + d) (by linarith : c + d < b + c + d)
    have h4 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left h₀.2.2.2 (by linarith : 0 < c + d) (by linarith : c + d < a + c + d)
    have h5 : a / (a + b) + b / (a + b) + c / (c + d) + d / (c + d) = 2 := by field_simp; linarith
    linarith

obtain ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩ := h₀
  constructor
  · rw [h₁]
    have g1 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith : a + b + d < a + b + c + d)
    have g2 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith : a + b + c < a + b + c + d)
    have g3 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith : b + c + d < a + b + c + d)
    have g4 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith : a + c + d < a + b + c + d)
    have : a / (a + b + c + d) + b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) = 1 := by
      rw [← add_div, ← add_div, ← add_div, div_self (by linarith)]
    linarith
  · rw [h₁]
    have g1 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith : a + b < a + b + d)
    have g2 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith : a + b < a + b + c)
    have g3 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith : c + d < b + c + d)
    have g4 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith : c + d < a + c + d)
    have : a / (a + b) + b / (a + b) + c / (c + d) + d / (c + d) = 2 := by
      rw [← add_div, ← add_div, div_self (by linarith), div_self (by linarith)]
    linarith

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩
  constructor
  · rw [h₁]
    have h1 : a / (a + b + c + d) < a / (a + b + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h2 : b / (a + b + c + d) < b / (a + b + c) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h3 : c / (a + b + c + d) < c / (b + c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h4 : d / (a + b + c + d) < d / (a + c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)
    linarith [show a / (a + b + c + d) + b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) = 1 by field_simp; linarith]
  · rw [h₁]
    have h1 : a / (a + b + d) < a / (a + b) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h2 : b / (a + b + c) < b / (a + b) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h3 : c / (b + c + d) < c / (c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h4 : d / (a + c + d) < d / (c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)
    linarith [show a / (a + b) + b / (a + b) + c / (c + d) + d / (c + d) = 2 by field_simp; linarith]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩
  constructor
  · rw [h₁]
    have : a / (a + b + c + d) + b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) = 1 := by field_simp; linarith
    linarith [div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith),
              div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith),
              div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith),
              div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)]
  · rw [h₁]
    have : a / (a + b) + b / (a + b) + c / (c + d) + d / (c + d) = 2 := by field_simp; linarith
    linarith [div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith),
              div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith),
              div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith),
              div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)]

simp [add_div]
      _ < a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d) := by
        gcongr <;> linarith
  · rw [h₁]
    calc a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d)
        < a / (a + b) + b / (a + b) + c / (c + d) + d / (c + d) := by
          gcongr <;> linarith
      _ = (a + b) / (a + b) + (c + d) / (c + d) := by
        simp [add_div]
      _ = 1 + 1 := by
        rw [div_self (ne_of_gt (by linarith)), div_self (ne_of_gt (by linarith))]
      _ = 2 := by norm_num

show a/hT + b/hT + c/hT + d/hT = 1 by field_simp [hT.ne']]
  · rw [h₁]; linarith [div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith : a+b > 0) (by linarith),
      div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith : a+b > 0) (by linarith),
      div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith : c+d > 0) (by linarith),
      div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith : c+d > 0) (by linarith),
      show (a+b)/(a+b) + (c+d)/(c+d) = 2 by field_simp [ha, hb, hc, hd]]

s := by rw [h₁]
  · calc s = a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d) := h₁
         _ < a / (a + b) + b / (a + b) + c / (c + d) + d / (c + d) := by
           repeat apply add_lt_add_of_lt_of_lt
           all_goals exact div_lt_div_of_pos_left (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith)
         _ = (a + b) / (a + b) + (c + d) / (c + d) := by rw [← add_div, ← add_div]
         _ = 2 := by rw [div_self (by linarith), div_self (by linarith)]; norm_num

obtain ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩ := h₀
  constructor
  · rw [h₁]
    calc 1 = a / (a + b + c + d) + b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) := by field_simp [by linarith : a + b + c + d ≠ 0]; ring
         _ < a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d) := by gcongr <;> linarith
  · rw [h₁]
    calc a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d)
         < a / (a + b) + b / (a + b) + c / (c + d) + d / (c + d) := by gcongr <;> linarith
       _ = 2 := by field_simp [by linarith : a + b ≠ 0, by linarith : c + d ≠ 0]; ring

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩
  constructor
  · rw [h₁]
    have : a / (a + b + c + d) < a / (a + b + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have : b / (a + b + c + d) < b / (a + b + c) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have : c / (a + b + c + d) < c / (b + c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have : d / (a + b + c + d) < d / (a + c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)
    linarith [(by field_simp; linarith : a / (a + b + c + d) + b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) = 1)]
  · rw [h₁]
    have : a / (a + b + d) < a / (a + b) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have : b / (a + b + c) < b / (a + b) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have : c / (b + c + d) < c / (c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have : d / (a + c + d) < d / (c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)
    linarith [(by field_simp; linarith : a / (a + b) + b / (a + b) = 1), (by field_simp; linarith : c / (c + d) + d / (c + d) = 1)]

show a / (a + b + c + d) + b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) = 1 by field_simp; linarith]
  · have h_a : a / (a + b + d) < a / (a + b) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h_b : b / (a + b + c) < b / (a + b) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h_c : c / (b + c + d) < c / (c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith)
    have h_d : d / (a + c + d) < d / (c + d) := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hd (by linarith) (by linarith)
    linarith [h₁, show a / (a + b) + b / (a + b) = 1 by field_simp; linarith,
                 show c / (c + d) + d / (c + d) = 1 by field_simp; linarith]

constructor
  · rw [h₁]
    have : a / (a + b + d) > a / (a + b + c + d) := by apply div_lt_div_left h₀.1 <;> linarith
    have : b / (a + b + c) > b / (a + b + c + d) := by apply div_lt_div_left h₀.2.1 <;> linarith
    have : c / (b + c + d) > c / (a + b + c + d) := by apply div_lt_div_left h₀.2.2.1 <;> linarith
    have : d / (a + c + d) > d / (a + b + c + d) := by apply div_lt_div_left h₀.2.2.2 <;> linarith
    have : a / (a + b + c + d) + b / (a + b + c + d) + c / (a + b + c + d) + d / (a + b + c + d) = 1 := by field_simp; ring
    linarith
  · rw [h₁]
    have : a / (a + b + d) < (a + c) / (a + b + c + d) := by rw [div_lt_div_iff (by linarith) (by linarith)]; nlinarith
    have : b / (a + b + c) < (b + d) / (a + b + c + d) := by rw [div_lt_div_iff (by linarith) (by linarith)]; nlinarith
    have : c / (b + c + d) < (c + a) / (a + b + c + d) := by rw [div_lt_div_iff (by linarith) (by linarith)]; nlinarith
    have : d / (a + c + d) < (d + b) / (a + b + c + d) := by rw [div_lt_div_iff (by linarith) (by linarith)]; nlinarith
    have : (a + c) / (a + b + c + d) + (b + d) / (a + b + c + d) + (c + a) / (a + b + c + d) + (d + b) / (a + b + c + d) = 2 := by field_simp; ring
    linarith

    linarith

constructor

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc, hd⟩
  constructor
  · have h2 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left ha (by linarith) (by linarith : a + b + d < a + b + c + d)
    have h3 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hb (by linarith) (by linarith : a + b + c < a + b + c + d)
    have h4 := div_lt_div_of_pos_left hc (by linarith) (by linarith : b + c + d < a + b + c + d)
